conversation_starters.title: Medina Lake levels surge after heavy rains, bringing hope to businesses and visitors
conversation_starters.summary: Medina Lake levels surge, boon to businesses — positive local condition, work-safe. You could open with: 'Heard Medina Lake finally came up after the rains — good news for the folks out there.'

conversation_starters.title: San Antonio hospital sees CAR T-cell therapy surge for cancer patients. Researchers are trying to find out if it could be used to treat MS and lupus.
conversation_starters.summary: Local hospital's cutting-edge cancer therapy research surge — notable metro medical story, work-safe. You could open with: 'Saw a San Antonio hospital is expanding that CAR T-cell therapy into MS and lupus research — pretty remarkable.'

conversation_starters.title: Salvation Army to distribute free supplies Saturday as flood cleanup begins in Kerrville
conversation_starters.summary: Relief effort (free supplies) tied to major local flooding — positive/mitigation framing makes it a conversation starter, not a check-in. You could open with: 'Did you hear the Salvation Army is handing out free supplies in Kerrville this weekend for the flood cleanup?'
